name: Machine Learning
title: Machine Learning Roadmap
description: Algorithms that learn from and make decisions based on data. Explore the path from foundational math to advanced deep learning.

body.raw: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. This interactive roadmap covers the essential steps, from the mathematical foundations and programming skills to core concepts like supervised and unsupervised learning, and finally to advanced topics in deep learning.
body.html: Dive into the field of Machine Learning, where algorithms enable systems to learn from data. This interactive roadmap covers the essential steps, from the mathematical foundations and programming skills to core concepts like supervised and unsupervised learning, and finally to advanced topics in deep learning.
